_readme: B2B-BRIEFING v0 customer profiles. Operator-editable. Each profile: id (file-name slug), display_name, domains (EXACT domain_classifier.py LABELS keys: finance/welfare/agriculture/labor/health/environment/SMB/realestate/statistics/education), keywords (substring-matched against cluster label_title + member titles), content_nature (keep-list gate on the representative node: government_policy/market_commercial/mixed_or_unclear; empty list = no gate). Relevance = domain OR keyword match; a profile needs at least one of the two.
